allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Content '\\''C:\\Users\\Admin\\.claude\\projects\\c--Whispera-test\\2a11f433-ade6-4796-8a2f-494a98bb8153.jsonl'\\'' -Tail 40 | ForEach-Object { try { $obj = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($obj.role\) { Write-Host "[$\($obj.role\)]: "; if \($obj.content -is [array]\) { $obj.content | ForEach-Object { if \($_.type -eq '\\''text'\\''\) { Write-Host $_.text.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(400,$_.text.Length\)\) } } } elseif \($obj.content -is [string]\) { Write-Host $obj.content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(400,$obj.content.Length\)\) }; Write-Host '\\''---'\\'' } } catch {} }')
